title: I Hate You Nigga, Let's Die
about: I Hate You Nigga, Let's Die, also known as IHYNLD, refers to a viral video of internet personality Hassan Campbell going on a rant about confronting someone outside of his house and saying, "I hate you, nigga. Let's die," implying that they should kill each other and die together. In 2025, the video resurfaced on TikTok, when a black-and-white video edit with somber music was shared on the platform. In the following weeks, Campbell's quote spread memetically as a catchphrase on sites like Twitter / X and elsewhere. The original clip comes from a November 2021 YouTube livestream, in which Campbell was berating fellow YouTuber 10 Toes Down (TTD).
origin:
On November 28th, 2021, YouTuber[3] 050DAMOVEMENT, also known as 050CHYNABRIM, hosted a livestream that has since been deleted, in which several men joined, including YouTubers Hassan Campbell and 10 Toes Down (TTD). Clips from the deleted stream were shared on November 28th by YouTubers[4][5] HARLEM LEGEND TV and Hassan Campbell Viral Clips.

The clip in question, originally shared as a clean version by YouTuber[5] Hassan Campbell Viral Clips on November 28th, showed Hassan Campbell confronting TTD. He tells TTD to pull up outside of his house, then his local precinct and finishes by saying, "I hate you, nigga. Let's die." TTD is seen in a Brooklyn Nets sweatshirt in the bottom left.

An uncensored version of the clip was shared by Instagram [6] user @audubon_175 on November 29th, 2025, after the clip had resurfaced en masse.

I don't wanna meet nowhere. Pull up in front of my house. Matter fact, you ain't even gotta pull up in front of my house. Pull in front of the motherfuckin' precinct and let's bang out. Right down the block, you know where it's at. You studied my whole neighborhood. Or pull up in front of the K-Mart and let's bang out. And let's do it on camera. I throw my life away, you throw your life away, right now. Right now. Let's do it for the camera. Right now. And if you win, I bring- I make sure I got like $70,000 in my pocket. If you body me, you can take the money. Right now. I hate you, nigga. Let's die.
